name: Rick Van Nieuwenhuyse
background: Mr. Van Nieuwenhuyse has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer since January 2020. He has over 40 years of experience in the natural resource sector. He was previously the President and CEO of Trilogy Metals Inc. and the founder of NovaGold Resources Inc.

commpanies.name: Contango Ore, Inc.
commpanies.title_or_role: Director, President and Chief Executive Officer
